# Anypoint CLI - Full Documentation

# CLI for Anypoint Platform Accounts

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Use the `account` commands to automate your Anypoint Plaform Account processes. For more information
about how to use these commands, refer to the
[Access Management documentation](../../access-management/).

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#account-business-group-describe">account:business-group:describe</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Show details of a business group</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#account-business-group-list">account:business-group:list</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Lists business groups</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#account-environment-create">account:environment:create</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Create new environment</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#account-environment-delete">account:environment:delete</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Delete an environment</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#account-environment-describe">account:environment:describe</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Shows details of an environment</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#account-environment-list">account:environment:list</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Lists environments</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#account-user-describe">account:user:describe</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Show account details</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## account:business-group:describe

\> account:business-group:describe \[flags\] <identifier>

Displays information on the business group you pass in `<identifier>`  
If `<identifier>` is not specified, the command describes the business group on the current session.
Identifier searches for ID match first, then name.

> [!NOTE] If your business group or organization name contains spaces, enclose its name between `"`
> characters.
>
> \> account:business-group:describe "QA Organization"

Returns the business group owner, type, subscription information, the entitlements of the group and
in which environment is running.

Use the `--output` flag to specify the response format. Supported values are `table` (default) and
`json`.

This command accepts the [default flags](./#default-options).

## account:business-group:list

\> account:business-group:list \[flags\]

Displays all [business groups](../../access-management/business-groups). It returns the name of the
business group, the type ('Master' or 'Business unit'), and the ID.

Use the `--output` flag to specify the response format. Supported values are `table` (default) and
`json`.

This command accepts the [default flags](./#default-options).

## account:environment:create

\> account:environment:create \[flags\] <name>

Creates a new environment using the name you set in `<name>`  
Use the `--type` flag to specify the environment type.  
Supported values for environment types are:

- `design`
- `production`
- `sandbox`

If no type is specified, the command creates a sandbox environment.

Use the `--output` flag to specify the response format. Supported values are `table` (default) and
`json`.

This command accepts the [default flags](./#default-options).

## account:environment:delete

\> account:environment:delete \[flags\] <name>

Deletes the environment specified in `<name>`

> [!WARNING] This command does not prompt twice before deleting. If you send a delete instruction,
> it does not ask for confirmation.

This command accepts the [default flags](./#default-options).

## account:environment:describe

\> account:environment:describe \[flags\] <name>

Returns information about the environment specified in `<name>`  
If no `<name>` is provided, this command returns information about the current sessionâs
environment.

Use the `--output` flag to specify the response format. Supported values are `table` (default) and
`json`.

This command accepts the [default flags](./#default-options).

## account:environment:list

\> account:environment:list \[flags\]

Lists all your environments in Anypoint Platform. It returns your environment name, Id and whether
itâs sandboxed or not.

Use the `--output` flag to specify the response format. Supported values are `table` (default) and
`json`.

This command accepts the [default flags](./#default-options).

## account:user:describe

\> account:user:describe \[flags\]

Returns your account information, including your username, your full name, your email address, and
the creation date of your account.

Use the `--output` flag to specify the response format. Supported values are `table` (default) and
`json`.

This command accepts the [default flags](./#default-options).
---

# CLI for Agent Fabric Plugin

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Use these commands to author, publish, and deploy agent network projects.

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#agent-network-project-build">agent-network:project:build</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Builds the agent network project and validates configuration</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#agent-network-project-create">agent-network:project:create</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Creates a new agent network project and generates the initial configuration files</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#agent-network-project-deploy">agent-network:project:deploy</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Deploys the agent network project to the target environment</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#agent-network-project-publish">agent-network:project:publish</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Publishes the agent network project to Anypoint Exchange</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="#agent-network-setup-gateways">agent-network:setup:gateways</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Sets up the gateways for the agent network</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## agent-network:project:build

\> anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project build \[flags\]

Builds the current agent network project using the Maven wrapper (`mvnw` or `mvnw.cmd`). This
command validates the configuration and generates the artifacts required for publishing and
deployment.

In addition to the [default flags](./#default-options), this command accepts these flags:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Flag</th><th>Description</th><th>Example</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Bearer token<br>You can also set it with <code>ANYPOINT_BEARER</code> env variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer myBearerToken</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client ID<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_ID</code> env variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id myClientID</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client Secret<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_SECRET</code> env variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret myClientSecret</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--[no-]collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Collect metrics<br>You can also set it with the <code>COLLECT_METRICS</code> env variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--no-collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--debug</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Enable debug mode</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--debug</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--environment &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Environment name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ENV</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--environment Sandbox</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--forceUpdate</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Force update the dependencies</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--forceUpdate</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--host &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Host URL<br>Default: <code>anypoint.mulesoft.com</code><br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_HOST</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--host mycompany.anypoint.mulesoft.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--organization &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Organization name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ORG</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--organization MyOrg</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--password &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_PASSWORD</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--password myPassword</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--path &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Path to the project<br>Default: <code>.</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--path ./my-agent-network</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--username &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Username<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_USERNAME</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--username myuser@example.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Example

$ anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project build

## agent-network:project:create

\> anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project create --name <projectName> \[flags\]

Creates a new agent network project in the current directory. The command generates a project folder
with initial configuration files, including `agent-network.yaml`.

In addition to the [default flags](./#default-options), this command accepts these flags:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Flag</th><th>Description</th><th>Example</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-n, --name &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>(Required) Name of the project</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--name my-agent-network</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-o, --output-dir &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Output directory for the project</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--output-dir ./projects</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--asset-id &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Asset ID (GAV)</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--asset-id my-asset</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--asset-version &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Asset version (GAV)<br>Default: <code>1.0.0</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--asset-version 1.2.0</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Bearer token<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_BEARER</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer myBearerToken</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client ID<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_ID</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id myClientID</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client Secret<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_SECRET</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret myClientSecret</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--[no-]collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Collect metrics<br>You can also set it with the <code>COLLECT_METRICS</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--no-collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--[no-]create-dir</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Create a new directory under <code>output-dir</code> using the project name</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--create-dir</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--environment &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Environment name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ENV</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--environment Sandbox</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--group-id &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Group ID (GAV)</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--group-id com.myorg</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--host &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Host URL<br>Default: <code>anypoint.mulesoft.com</code><br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_HOST</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--host mycompany.anypoint.mulesoft.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--organization &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Organization name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ORG</code> env variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--organization MyOrg</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--password &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_PASSWORD</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--password myPassword</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--tab-size &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Tab size for indenting the API specification<br>Default: <code>2</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--tab-size 4</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--username &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Username<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_USERNAME</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--username myuser@example.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Example

$ anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project create --name my-agent-network

## agent-network:project:deploy

\> anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project deploy \[flags\]

Deploys the agent network application to the target private space. By default, the command uses the
`agent-network-ingress-gw` and `agent-network-egress-gw` gateways, and the `agent-network-space`
private space. You can override these values using flags.

In addition to the [default flags](./#default-options), this command accepts these flags:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Flag</th><th>Description</th><th>Example</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-e, --egress-gw &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the target egress gateway<br>Default: <code>agent-network-egress-gw</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--egress-gw custom-egress</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-i, --ingress-gw &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the target ingress gateway<br>Default: <code>agent-network-ingress-gw</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--ingress-gw custom-ingress</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-t, --target-space &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the target private space to deploy<br>Default: <code>agent-network-space</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--target-space my-space</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Bearer token<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_BEARER</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer myBearerToken</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client ID<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_ID</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id myClientID</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client Secret<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_SECRET</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret myClientSecret</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--[no-]collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Collect metrics<br>You can also set it with the <code>COLLECT_METRICS</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--no-collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--disable-tracing</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Disable tracing functionalities</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--disable-tracing</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--dont-wait-for-agent-network</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Do not wait for the agent network to be ready</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--dont-wait-for-agent-network</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--environment &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Environment name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ENV</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--environment Sandbox</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--host &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Host URL<br>Default: <code>anypoint.mulesoft.com</code><br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_HOST</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--host mycompany.anypoint.mulesoft.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--organization &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Organization name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ORG</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--organization MyOrg</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--password &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_PASSWORD</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--password myPassword</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--path &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Path to the project<br>Default: <code>.</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--path ./my-agent-network</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--property &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>One or more deployment properties in <code>name:value</code> format</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--property logLevel:DEBUG</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--username &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Username<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_USERNAME</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--username myuser@example.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--json</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Format output as JSON</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--json</code></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Example

$ anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project deploy --environment Staging --target-space
staging-private-space --property openai.apiKey:STAGING_API_KEY

## agent-network:project:publish

\> anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project publish \[flags\]

Publishes the current agent network project to Anypoint Exchange. The command outputs links and
details for all created assets.

In addition to the [default flags](./#default-options), this command accepts these flags:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Flag</th><th>Description</th><th>Example</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Bearer token<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_BEARER</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer myBearerToken</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client ID<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_ID</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id myClientID</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client Secret<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_CLIENT_SECRET</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret myClientSecret</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--[no-]collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Collect metrics<br>You can also set it with the <code>COLLECT_METRICS</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--no-collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--debug</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Enable debug mode</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--debug</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--environment &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Environment name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ENV</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--environment Sandbox</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--host &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Host URL<br>Default: <code>anypoint.mulesoft.com</code><br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_HOST</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--host mycompany.anypoint.mulesoft.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--organization &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Organization name<br>You can also set it with <code>ANYPOINT_ORG</code> env variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--organization MyOrg</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--password &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_PASSWORD</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--password myPassword</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--path &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Path to the project<br>Default: <code>.</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--path ./my-agent-network</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--username &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Username<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_USERNAME</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--username myuser@example.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--json</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Format output as JSON</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--json</code></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Example

$ anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network project publish

## agent-network:setup:gateways

\> anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network setup gateways \[flags\]

Sets up the agent network environment with the required ingress and egress gateways in the specified
target private space. This step is required only if the target space does not already have gateways.
In the typical (happy path) workflow, you run it once per target space before the first deployment.

In addition to the [default flags](./#default-options), this command accepts these flags:

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Flag</th><th>Description</th><th>Example</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-e, --egress-gw &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the egress gateway<br>Default: <code>agent-network-egress-gw</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--egress-gw my-egress</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-i, --ingress-gw &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the ingress gateway<br>Default: <code>agent-network-ingress-gw</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--ingress-gw my-ingress</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>-t, --target-space &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Name of the target private space where the gateways will be set up<br>Default: <code>agent-network-space</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--target-space my-space</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Bearer token<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_BEARER</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--bearer myBearerToken</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client ID<br>You can also set it with the`ANYPOINT_CLIENT_ID` variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_id myClientID</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Client Secret<br>You can also set it with the`ANYPOINT_CLIENT_SECRET` variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--client_secret myClientSecret</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--[no-]collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Collect metrics<br>You can also set it with the`COLLECT_METRICS` variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--no-collectMetrics</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--environment &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Environment name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ENV</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--environment Sandbox</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--host &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Host URL<br>Default: <code>anypoint.mulesoft.com</code><br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_HOST</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--host mycompany.anypoint.mulesoft.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--organization &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Organization name<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_ORG</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--organization MyOrg</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--password &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Password<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_PASSWORD</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--password myPassword</code></p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><code>--username &lt;value&gt;</code></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Username<br>You can also set it with the <code>ANYPOINT_USERNAME</code> variable</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p><code>--username myuser@example.com</code></p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Example

$ anypoint-cli-agent-fabric-plugin agent-network setup gateways --target-space my-space
---

# Anypoint Platform CLI Release Notes

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Platform CLI is a scripting and command-line tool for Anypoint Platform and Anypoint
Platform Private Cloud Edition (Anypoint Platform PCE).

The following release notes are provided for Anypoint Platform CLI:

- [Anypoint Platform CLI 4.x](../../release-notes/cli/anypoint-platform-cli-4)
- [Anypoint Platform CLI 3.x](../../release-notes/cli/anypoint-platform-cli)

## See Also

- [Anypoint CLI Documentation](./)
---

# Anypoint CLI 4.x List of Commands

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Platform CLI provides the ability to manage these features in Anypoint Platform:

- [Anypoint Platform Accounts](#account)
- [Agent Fabric](#agent-fabric)
- [API Catalog](#catalog)
- [API Governance](#api-gov)
- [API Manager](#api-mgr)
- [Cloudhub 2.0](#cloudhub-2)
- [Cloudhub Apps](#cloudhub-apps)
- [Cloudhub Dedicated Load Balancers](#cloudhub-dlb)
- [Cloudhub Anypoint VPCs](#cloudhub-vpc)
- [Datagraph Load Balancer](#datagraph-load-balancer)
- [Design Center](#design-center)
- [DX Mule](#dx-mule)
- [Exchange Assets](#exchange)
- [Hybrid Applications](#standalone-apps)
- [Alerts for Hybrid Applications](#standalone-alerts)
- [Local Servers](#servers)
- [Local Server Clusters](#server-clusters)
- [Local Server Groups](#server-groups)
- [Managed Omni Gateways](#managed-gateways)
- [PDK Policy Projects](#policy-project)

instance</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="api-mgr#api-mgr-upstream-delete">api-mgr:upstream:delete</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Deletes an upstream from an API instance</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="api-mgr#api-mgr-upstream-edit">api-mgr:upstream:edit</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Edits an upstream of an API instance</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="api-mgr#api-mgr-upstream-list">api-mgr:upstream:list</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Lists all upstreams for an API instance</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Cloudhub 2.0

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-delete">runtime-mgr:application:delete</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Deletes an application</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-describe">runtime-mgr:application:describe</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Describes an application</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-deploy">runtime-mgr:application:deploy</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Deploys an application to a specified target using an Exchange application and runs the specified runtime version</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-download-logs">runtime-mgr:application:download:logs</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Downloads logs of an application from a specification to a specified directory</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-list">runtime-mgr:application:list</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Lists all applications in an organization</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-modify">runtime-mgr:application:modify</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Modifies a deployed application</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-start">runtime-mgr:application:start</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Starts a stopped application</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-stop">runtime-mgr:application:stop</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Stops running an application</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="cloudhub2-apps#runtime-mgr-application-logs">runtime-mgr:application:logs</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Tails an applicationâs logs from a specification</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

> [!NOTE] Exchange commands are currently not available for GovCloud.

## Hybrid Applications

> [!CAUTION] For the Anypoint Platform CLI to recognize your target servers, each server must be
> manually registered with the platform.

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><a application</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Alerts for Hybrid Applications

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="standalone-alerts#runtime-mgr-standalone-alert-create">runtime-mgr:standalone-alert:create</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Creates new alert for standalone runtime</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="standalone-alerts#runtime-mgr-standalone-alert-describe">runtime-mgr:standalone-alert:describe</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Describes an alert</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="standalone-alerts#runtime-mgr-standalone-alert-list">runtime-mgr:standalone-alert:list</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Lists all alerts for standalone runtimes in the environment</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="standalone-alerts#runtime-mgr-standalone-alert-modify">runtime-mgr:standalone-alert:modify</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Modifies alert for standalone runtime</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Local Servers

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="servers#runtime-mgr-server-describe">runtime-mgr:server:describe</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Describes server</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="servers#runtime-mgr-server-delete">runtime-mgr:server:delete</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Deletes server</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="servers#runtime-mgr-server-list">runtime-mgr:server:list</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Changes an standalone application artifact</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="servers#runtime-mgr-server-modify">runtime-mgr:server:modify</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Modifies server</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="servers#runtime-mgr-server-token">runtime-mgr:server:token</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Gets server registration token. This token needs to be used to register a new server</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Local Server Clusters

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Command</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="server-clusters#runtime-mgr-cluster-add-server">runtime-mgr:cluster:add:server</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Adds server to cluster</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="server-clusters#runtime-mgr-cluster-create">runtime-mgr:cluster:create</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Creates new cluster</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="server-clusters#runtime-mgr-cluster-describe">runtime-mgr:cluster:describe</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Describes server cluster</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="server-clusters#runtime-mgr-cluster-delete">runtime-mgr:cluster:delete</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Deletes cluster</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="server-clusters#runtime-mgr-cluster-modify">runtime-mgr:cluster:modify</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Modifies cluster</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="server-clusters#runtime-mgr-cluster-list">runtime-mgr:cluster:list</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Lists all clusters in the environment</p></div></div></td></tr><tr><td><div><div><p><a href="server-clusters#runtime-mgr-cluster-remove-server">runtime-mgr:cluster:remove:server</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Removes server from a cluster</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
